results.rendered_html: nemann-iṣ mfn. (prob. loc. neman [√2. nī] and √3. iṣ) following guidance, striving after, seeking to reach or overtake (sc. Indra, said of praises),  RV. i, 56, 2  ( Sāy.  praisers, ‘moving reverentially or bearing oblations’).

results.rendered_html: nemanniṣ (neman [als loc. zu fassen] von 1. nī + II. iṣ) etwa der Führung folgend: taṃ gūrtayo nemanniṣaḥ parīṇasaḥ samudraṃ na saṃcaraṇe saniṣyavaḥ  ṚV. 1,56,2 . Nach  SĀY.  entweder unter Verbeugungen gehend oder Opfer darbringend.
